official_page.title: Figma Config 2026 | June 23-25 - Moscone Center SF
official_page.theme: Figma’s conference for people who build products

official_takeaways.what_youll_learn: Hear from leading product builders about the future of design and product development and be first to dive into Figma's newest products and features.
official_takeaways.what_to_expect: Keynotes, hands-on demos, and deep-dive product design sessions.
official_takeaways.who_youll_meet: Over 10,000 designers, developers, marketers, and product leaders attend Config every year.
official_takeaways.config_commons: Badge pickup, swag, and community meetup happen on Tuesday, June 23.
official_takeaways.watch_parties: Official local watch parties are promoted for people not attending in person.
official_takeaways.community_events: Attendees can submit side events such as hikes or happy hours.
official_takeaways.attendance_mode: The event is offered both in person and virtually.

public_source_profile.travel_constraint: User is based in Shanghai and cannot attend in person this year.
public_source_profile.portfolio_direction: Structured SaaS and design-system work, muted blue/teal accents, component grids, practical product UI.

recommended_focus_areas: What you'll learn / newest products and features
